title: MACP Error
description: Validates an MACPError message in JSON form. See RFC-MACP-0001.

code.description: Machine-readable error code from the error code registry.

message.description: Human-readable error message. Text may vary across implementations.

session_id.description: Session identifier related to the error.

message_id.description: Message identifier that triggered the error.

details.description: Additional structured error details (protobuf bytes as base64).
